name: python-vxi11

metadata.name: python-vxi11
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: Python VXI-11 driver for controlling instruments over Ethernet

documentation:
This Python package supports the VXI-11 Ethernet
instrument control protocol for controlling VXI11 and LXI compatible instruments.

Commands are sent to the VXI-11 device after every newline. If the command
ends in '?' the response is received.

modules.name: vxi11.rpc
documentation:
Sun RPC version 2 -- RFC1057

This file is drawn from Python's RPC demo, updated for python 3.  There
doesn't seem to be an original author or license associated the original
file.

XXX There should be separate exceptions for the various reasons why
XXX an RPC can fail, rather than using RuntimeError for everything

XXX Need to use class based exceptions rather than string exceptions

XXX The UDP version of the protocol resends requests when it does
XXX not receive a timely reply -- use only for idempotent calls!

XXX There is no provision for call timeout on TCP connections

Original source: http://svn.python.org/projects/python/trunk/Demo/rpc/rpc.py

functions.name: vxi11.rpc.test
documentation: Simple test program -- dump portmapper status

classes.name: vxi11.rpc.RawTCPClient
documentation: Client using TCP to a specific port

classes.name: vxi11.rpc.RawUDPClient
documentation: Client using UDP to a specific port

classes.name: vxi11.rpc.RawBroadcastUDPClient
documentation: Client using UDP broadcast to a specific port

classes.name: vxi11.rpc.PortMapperPacker
documentation: A pmaplist is a variable-length list of mappings, as follows:
A call_args is (prog, vers, proc, args) where args is opaque;
a call_result is (port, res) where res is opaque.

classes.name: vxi11.rpc.TCPClient
documentation: Generic clients that find their server through the Port mapper

classes.name: vxi11.rpc.Server
documentation: These are not symmetric to the Client classes
XXX No attempt is made to provide authorization hooks yet
